concerns.text: The plan cites 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/MathLLMs/MathVision/resolve/main/data/test-00000-of-00001-3532b8d3f1b4047a.parquet' for the MATH dataset. MathVision is a multimodal dataset containing images and questions, not the standard text-only MATH dataset required for token-level entropy analysis of reasoning traces. The standard MATH dataset is hosted at 'huggingface.co/datasets/hendrycks/math'. Using MathVision will fail to provide the necessary text-only reasoning traces for the static scoring phase, making the dataset inappropriate for the research question.

The plan states 'No verified APPO-specific dataset found' and proposes implementing APPO from scratch. While APPO is an algorithm, the plan lacks a citation for the specific APPO implementation or environment wrapper to be used. For reproducibility (Constitution Principle I), the plan must cite the specific code repository or library (e.g., a specific GitHub repo for 'APPO' or 'Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization') that will be adapted, rather than asserting it will be 'implemented from scratch' without a reference implementation to validate against.
